description: The foundation layer for agentic intelligence.

Official remote MCP server for Atlassian. Securely connect Jira, Confluence, Jira Service Management, Bitbucket, and Compass to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, VS Code, and other AI tools using OAuth 2.1 or API tokens.
Lightweight Agent Workstation for Codex CLI + Claude Code — with task scheduler, git worktree & remote control, skills management
AI coding tools that give free Claude Opus/Sonnet, GPT-5, Gemini Pro, and other pro-grade models
